headline: Reasons Why You Should Retain Veralto Stock in Your Portfolio Now
summary: VLTO gains from water-quality solutions, semiconductor-linked demand and acquisitions. However, rising costs and competition pose risks.

headline: Metir lands first US sale of PFAS detector as shares jump 33%
summary: Metir (LSE:MET), the water and environmental monitoring company, has made its first commercial sale of a PFAS detection unit in the United States, with shares jumping 33% to 0.9p on the news. The buyer is Veralto, a Nasdaq-listed water quality business with a market capitalisation of $20...
